Common Questions

Do I need tech skills to get started?+
Absolutely not. All our products are designed for complete beginners. If you can use Google, you can use our systems. We show you exactly what to click, step by step.
How long before I see results?+
Most students see their first wins within 7-14 days. Consistent results typically happen within 30-90 days depending on the path you choose.
Is there a money-back guarantee?+
Yes — every product comes with a 30-day money-back guarantee. No questions asked. We want you to succeed, not to take your money if it doesn't work for you.
Where do I start if I'm a complete beginner?+
Start with our Free AI Starter Kit — it's zero risk. Then, if you want to go further, the ChatGPT Cheat Sheet ($7) is the perfect first purchase. From there, let your results guide your next step.
